prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Failed Exit
prompts.description: Readout sentence for failed-exit response pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing for repair, explanation, or restraint around departure and failed exit.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Exposure
prompts.description: Readout sentence for exposure, concern, and public management pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing around exposure, concern, recoil, and who must manage what has become public.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Judgment
prompts.description: Readout sentence for taste, manners, and status pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing for restraint or explanation around taste, manners, and status.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Hospitality
prompts.description: Readout sentence for manners, hospitality, and overfamiliarity pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing around manners, hospitality, and whether care has become overfamiliarity.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Humiliation
prompts.description: Readout sentence for interruption, priority, and humiliation pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing for deference, apology, or exposure management around interruption and priority.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Hosting
prompts.description: Readout sentence for brittle hosting-surface pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing around brittle hospitality, overfamiliarity, and how one handles the hosting surface.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Answerability
prompts.description: Readout sentence for active answerability pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing for answerability rather than letting the act pass.

prompts.name: Readout Response Pressure Default
prompts.description: Fallback readout sentence for social-answer pressure.
prompts.template: The room is pressing for some form of social answer rather than letting the act remain neutral.

prompts.name: Why Reply Failed Repair Spouse
prompts.description: Explains why a failed-repair act draws spouse-axis pressure at the doorway.
prompts.template: The room read the act as failed repair, so the {side} answered through spouse embarrassment at the doorway{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Failed Repair
prompts.description: Explains why a failed-repair act pulls the answer to the doorway.
prompts.template: The room read the act as failed repair, so departure pressure pulled the {side} answer to the doorway{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Exposure
prompts.description: Explains why exposure pulls the answer to the bathroom edge.
prompts.template: The room read the act as exposure, so care, recoil, and witness pressure pulled the {side} answer to the bathroom edge{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Taste Status Side
prompts.description: Explains why taste and status strain pulls a side answer onto the books.
prompts.template: The room read the act as taste and household judgment, so status strain pulled a {side} answer onto the books{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Taste Status Cross
prompts.description: Explains why taste and status strain answers through cross-couple pressure.
prompts.template: The room read the act as taste and household judgment, so cross-couple strain answered through the books{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Hospitality
prompts.description: Explains why hospitality and manners pull the answer onto flowers.
prompts.template: The room read the act through hospitality and manners, so boundary strain pulled a {side} answer onto the flowers{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Humiliation
prompts.description: Explains why humiliation and public priority pull the answer onto the phone.
prompts.template: The room read the act through humiliation and public priority, so humiliation pressure pulled a {side} answer onto the phone{hook} and let the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Alliance
prompts.description: Explains shifting coalition response instead of settled side response.
prompts.template: The room is answering through a shifting coalition rather than a settled side{hook} and letting the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Repair
prompts.description: Explains a repair-shaped exchange response.
prompts.template: The room is forcing the act into a repair-shaped exchange, making the {side} carry the answer{hook} and letting the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Redirect Blame
prompts.description: Explains blame and social-cost redirection.
prompts.template: The room is reusing the act to move blame and social cost onto the {side} answer{hook} and letting the reply {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Withhold
prompts.description: Explains oblique pressure during withhold or evade response.
prompts.template: The room is making the answer slippery; pressure is still there, it is arriving through the {side} obliquely{hook}, and the reply is trying to {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Why Reply Default
prompts.description: Fallback explanation for answerable act routing.
prompts.template: The room is treating the act as answerable, routing the reply through the {side}{hook}, and letting it {pull}, in {signature}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Failed Exit
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for failed-exit exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a failed-exit exchange now; the {side} is answering through departure pressure, and the reply is trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Exposure
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for exposure exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside an exposure exchange now; the {side} is answering through care, recoil, and witness pressure, trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Judgment
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for judgment exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a judgment exchange now; the {side} is answering through taste, manners, and status, trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Hospitality
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for brittle hospitality exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a brittle hospitality exchange now; the {side} is answering through manners and overfamiliarity pressure, trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Humiliation
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for humiliation exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a humiliation exchange now; the {side} is answering through public priority and contempt risk, trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Repair
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for repair-shaped exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a repair-shaped exchange now; the {side} is carrying the answer and trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Blame
prompts.description: Readout foothold sentence for blame-moving exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a blame-moving exchange now; the {side} is carrying redistributed social cost and trying to {pull}.

prompts.name: Observation Foothold Default
prompts.description: Fallback readout foothold sentence for live exchange.
prompts.template: You are inside a live exchange now; the {side} is answering what you did and trying to {pull}.
